label: Now Developing
items: Sara Duterte’s impeachment cleared probable cause in the House justice committee while Rodrigo Duterte’s ICC case moved into trial-management mode.
Balikatan expanded into five-navy West Philippine Sea drills, Scarborough pushback, and NMESIS sea-denial testing in Batanes.
The week’s lived-pressure stories centered on a record-low peso, Labor Day wage protests, OFW redeployment pressure, and Mayon ashfall alongside danger-level heat.
